```idris
module Tests

import Test.Golden.RunnerHelper
import System

main : IO ()
main = do
  env <- getEnv "RUNNING_INTERNAL_TESTS"
  case env of
    Just "1" => do
      goldenRunner
        [ "Simple tests" `atDir` "simple-tests"
        , "Hedgehog Properties" `atDir` "using-hedgehog"
        ]
    _ => do
      ignore $ setEnv "RUNNING_INTERNAL_TESTS" "1" True
      args <- getArgs
      let cmd = unwords args
      exit <- system cmd
      if exit == 0
        then do
          putStrLn "Tests passed. Building document..."
          0 <- system "if [ -f Scripts/run.sh ]; then bash Scripts/run.sh; else bash ../Scripts/run.sh; fi"
            | err => do putStrLn "Failed to build document"; exitFailure
          exitSuccess
        else exitFailure
```
